report.summary: Audited 5 recently added pages for UX issues; refactored both exchange comparison pages from inline styles to Tailwind with full responsive design, accessibility, and interactive FAQ accordions.

sections.title: UX Audit Results
items: Audited: daily-challenge, airdrops, bybit-vs-binance, gate-io-vs-kucoin, cashback-calculator
Airdrops page: strong UX - proper ARIA, 44px touch targets, responsive grids, countdown timer
Cashback calculator: strong UX - real-time calculations, CSS variables, responsive Tailwind layout
Daily challenge: acceptable UX - delegates to DailyChallenge component, breadcrumb present
Exchange comparison pages (both): CRITICAL issues found - all inline styles, no responsive breakpoints, no ARIA, no focus states

sections.title: UX Improvements Implemented
items: Bybit vs Binance: full rewrite from inline styles to Tailwind CSS with responsive breakpoints (mobile/tablet/desktop)
Gate.io vs KuCoin: full rewrite from inline styles to Tailwind CSS with responsive breakpoints (mobile/tablet/desktop)
Both pages: added aria-labelledby on all sections, aria-label on tables, scope on th elements
Both pages: security/startup comparison grids now stack vertically on mobile with labeled values
Both pages: FAQ sections converted to interactive details/summary accordions with 44px min touch targets
Both pages: added focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 on all interactive FAQ elements
Both pages: responsive padding (px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8) and fluid typography (text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl)
Both pages: hover states on cards (border color transition) for visual feedback

sections.title: Visuals Status
items: OG images: all 7 checked pages already have PNG+SVG OG image pairs
No new OG images needed this cycle - coverage is complete for recent pages
Pages checked: daily-challenge, airdrops, bybit-vs-binance, gate-io-vs-kucoin, cashback-calculator, courses, badges
